message:
Add hash() builtin, fix async allocator warning

- math.zig: Add genHash for hash(x) builtin
- runtime.zig: Add pyHash fallback for strings
- body.zig: Suppress unused allocator in async impls
- generators.zig: Document function-skip design

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ const BuiltinMap = std.StaticStringMap(BuiltinHandler).initComptime(.{
     .{ "round", builtins.genRound },
     .{ "pow", builtins.genPow },
     .{ "divmod", builtins.genDivmod },
+    .{ "hash", builtins.genHash },
     // Collections
     .{ "all", builtins.genAll },
     .{ "any", builtins.genAny },
